acceptance_criteria: All numeric claims in the draft are traceable to current outputs or to the audit's accepted framing.
Every figure reference points to a figure that remains in the accepted evidence chain.
Legacy figures and deprecated model claims are not used as evidence.
Mechanism language for fragility and austerity remains conditional and calibration-aware.
constraints: Use the rebuilt package README and audit as the primary evidence boundary documents.
If a claim cannot be verified, weaken or remove it rather than infer new support.
description: Check the draft against money_minsky_policy_mismatch_AUDIT.md and the accepted model surface; flag or fix any sentence that is stronger than the current code or figure support.
goal: Verify that every quantitative claim, figure reference, and mechanism statement in the draft matches the accepted evidence chain and audit.
implementation_notes: Superseded by task-008, which turns the former evidence pass into a stricter claim-support ledger and quantitative-validity review keyed to the actual draft and audit findings.
title: Evidence pass against audit for money-minsky-policy-mismatch
